rows.notes: Both extractors correctly identified this as the page title header with no amounts. Consensus reached.
Both extractors correctly identified this as the year header with no amounts. Consensus reached.

Visual verification confirms £40, s11, d2. gemini-flash correctly identified these amounts. gpt-5-mini incorrectly read pounds as '407' and identified a half-penny fraction that is not clearly visible in the image.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Ten percent on estates, amounting to £40 11s 2d.

rows.description: Fifteen per cent on Room Rent
rows.notes: Visual verification confirms £23, s5, d4 with a clear '½' fraction. gemini-flash was entirely correct for the amounts and fraction. gpt-5-mini misread pounds as '235', shillings as '4', and pence as '2'.
rows.english_description: Fifteen percent share on room-rent receipts.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Fifteen percent on room rent, amounting to £23 5s 4½d.

rows.notes: Amounts (£7, s5, d2) are consistent and visually clear from both extractors. The description 'Bushee Divds.' was refined based on a closer visual reading of the original image, which is more accurate than either extractor's spelling variation ('Divd.' or 'Divs').
rows.english_description: Dividends from the Bushee fund or investment.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Dividends from Bushee, amounting to £7 5s 2d.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly combined the full description as it appears on a single line in the ledger. Visual verification confirms the amounts are £87, s5, d0. gemini-flash erroneously split 'Local Rate 12.5.0' into a separate, amount-less row.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Masters composition for Domus, amounting to £87 5s 0d (includes local rate noted in the description).

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified '2 Do' as the description and noted the 'nil' in the margin, indicating no monetary amounts for this line. Visual verification confirms this interpretation. gemini-flash misidentified 'nil' as the primary description and completely missed '2 Do'.
rows.english_description: Second masters composition fee for the Domus (same type of receipt as the previous masters composition entry).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Masters composition for Domus, amount not specified on this line.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly combined the description and associated details as they appear on one line. rows.english_description: Third masters composition receipt for the Domus; local rate component is noted.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Masters composition for Domus, amounting to £51 12s 6d (includes local rate noted in the description).

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly identified the description and amounts (£3, s0, d0), confirmed by visual verification. gemini-flash mislabeled this row's amounts with a description ('3 Do') from a previous conceptual row.

rows.notes: gpt-5-mini correctly extracted the amounts (£43, s0, d0), visually confirmed. The description spelling 'Dickeson' from gemini-flash is slightly more accurate visually. gemini-flash misread the monetary values for this row, associating amounts from a later entry.

rows.notes: Combined the best of both: gpt-5-mini for amounts (£9, s3, d7), visually confirmed (pence '7' is clear), and gemini-flash for the description ('Plate'). gpt-5-mini misread 'Plate' as 'Estate'. gemini-flash incorrectly stated no amounts for this row and provided a misleading justification in its notes.

rows.notes: Pounds, shillings, and pence are clear and consistent between extractors. Visual verification confirms the fraction is ¼ (0.25), not ¾. gpt-5-mini correctly identified the fraction. Its note expressing moderate uncertainty was helpful, whereas gemini-flash claimed perfect legibility for an incorrect fraction.
